title: E2E: cargo test + clippy + fmt clean for all API ergonomics changes
description:
What: Full workspace validation after all API ergonomics changes are landed.

Algorithm:
1. cargo fmt --all  (fix any formatting issues introduced by the changes)
2. cargo clippy --all-features --workspace -- -D warnings  (zero warnings)
3. cargo test --workspace  (all tests pass)
4. cargo doc --no-deps --all-features --workspace  (docs build without errors)
5. Run typos on crates/jmap-chat/src/ and crates/jmap-chat-egui/src/ (fix any typos introduced)
6. Verify:
   - No #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] remain in methods.rs
   - No raw api_url: &str or account_id: &str remain as method parameters in methods.rs
   - SetResponse is now SetResponse<T> with generic T
   - SenderIdOrSelf enum exists and is used in Message.sender_id and Reaction.sender_id
   - UTCDate has a parse() method
   - JmapChatClient implements Clone
   - filter_kind uses Option<ChatKind>
7. Close this bead.

Defensive rules:
- Do not modify tests to make them pass — fix the implementation.
- cargo fmt changes are committed alongside any other fixes.
- If any step fails, identify root cause and fix it.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace exits 0. cargo clippy --all-features --workspace -- -D warnings exits 0. cargo fmt --all --check exits 0. All 8 API ergonomics changes verified present.
